# YourSkinCBR - Full Site Content

> Skin cancer specialist GPs providing comprehensive checks, FotoFinder imaging, and procedures across two Canberra locations.

---

## Home Page

### Book Your Skin Cancer Check in Canberra

Qualified skin-cancer specialist GPs. Advanced diagnostic tools. Two locations.

- 2 Convenient Locations
- 5 Specialist GPs
- 24/7 Online Booking

**Special Saturday Clinics Available**: Dr Reiham Ibrahim has the first Saturday of every month available for appointments. Book Saturday Session: https://yourgp.group/reiham-ibr

### Why Choose YourSkinCBR?

Professional skin cancer care with the expertise and convenience you deserve.

- **Advanced Credentials**: Every GP holds a Diploma or Master's in Skin Cancer Medicine.
- **Latest Techniques**: Regular updates on latest skin cancer detection and treatment methods.
- **On-site Procedure Rooms**: Biopsies and most excisions done right here, usually within a week.

### What Our Patients Say

- "I was grateful that Dr Reiham was able to fit me in for an urgent appointment before I went on holiday. After examining the area I was worried about, she reassured me that everything was fine. She also took the opportunity to do a full skin check at the same time. Using impressive new imaging technology, she showed me detailed close-ups of potential problem areas on a monitor." — A.R., Crace
- "Myself and my boyfriend saw Dr Reiham Ibrahim for our yearly skin checks. She was absolutely lovely with an incredible bed side manner. Would recommend for an easy and comfortable experience with a genuinely lovely woman." — L.L., Crace
- "I saw Dr Reiham Ibrahim for a Skin Cancer check at YourGP@Crace. From the moment I walked in, the reception staff were welcoming and very efficient. Dr Ibrahim immediately put me at ease and was extremely professional and knowledgeable. For my first visit I would highly recommend this surgery." — C.M., Crace
- "Always pleasant reception, and Dr Ian Chan an excellent Doctor and meticulous in skin checks." — M.V.A., Denman Prospect
- "Doctor Ian Chan is extremely thorough with skin checks, and does mole excisions on site." — D.L., Denman Prospect
- "Dr Ian Chan was great, took his time and carefully explained things and looked into the issue. Highly recommend, really knew his stuff." — L.K., Denman Prospect
- "Incredible, felt very relaxed with Dr Ian Chan!! Prompt and very friendly. Thank you - melanoma Survivor" — W.C., Denman Prospect
- "Visited YourGP at Crace today to have a lump and moles checked. Dr Kit Wong was wonderful and reassuring; reception staff were lovely and welcoming. Highly recommend. Thank you." — J.L., Crace
- "The front desk staff are exceptionally welcoming, professional and friendly. I can't recommend Dr Kit Wong highly enough for skin checks and related issues. His manner is calm, reassuring, respectful and informative." — B.B., Crace
- "Absolutely amazing. Dr Kit has previously gone over and above at couple of other appointments. He is an extremely caring Doctor and is absolutely brilliant at suturing." — K.J., Crace
- "Excellent service from Dr Chi So. The biopsy was done on the same day with minimal discomfort. Having everything done in one location made the process so much easier." — M.T., Denman Prospect
- "Dr Rachel Liang spotted something I would have missed. The quick turnaround for results and the fact I could have treatment on-site saved me time and worry." — D.R., Denman Prospect

### Choose Your Location

Two convenient Canberra locations offering comprehensive skin cancer services.

#### YourSkinCBR Crace
- Address: Unit 1, 5 Baratta St, Crace ACT 2911
- Features: FotoFinder imaging (Dr Reiham), Biopsies and most excisions

| Doctor | Standard | Long | Medicare Rebate |
|--------|----------|------|-----------------|
| Dr Kit Wong (new patients welcome) | $190 | $230 | $43.90 / $84.90 |
| Dr Ian Chan (skin-related visits only) | $190 | $230 | $43.90 / $84.90 |
| Dr Reiham Ibrahim (FotoFinder imaging) | $190 | $230 | $43.90 / $84.90 |

Book Crace: https://www.yourskincbr.com.au/book-crace/

#### YourSkinCBR Denman Prospect
- Address: Level 1, 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611
- Features: Biopsies and most excisions

| Doctor | <20 min | >20 min | Medicare Rebate |
|--------|---------|---------|-----------------|
| Dr Chi So | $180 | $220 | $43.90 / $84.90 |
| Dr Rachel Liang | $180 | $220 | $43.90 / $84.90 |

Book Denman: https://www.yourskincbr.com.au/book-denman/

### What to Expect

Your journey with YourSkinCBR — from booking to treatment, all in one convenient location.

1. **Book** — Choose your location and preferred doctor online or call (02) 6109 0000
2. **Skin Check** — Comprehensive examination including dermoscopy and FotoFinder imaging (Dr Reiham)
3. **Biopsy if Needed** — Same doctor, same site — no referrals needed for most procedures
4. **Results** — Pathology results typically available within one week
5. **Treatment** — On-site excision for most cases
6. **Aftercare** — All aftercare provided on site by the treating doctor and nursing team

### Frequently Asked Questions

**Will I get a Medicare rebate?**
Yes — Medicare rebates are processed automatically on the day of your consultation. Standard consultations attract a $43.90 rebate, while longer consultations (>20 minutes) attract an $84.90 rebate.

**Is there an extra cost for FotoFinder imaging?**
No additional charge applies for FotoFinder digital dermoscopic imaging with Dr Reiham Ibrahim. The standard consultation fee covers this advanced imaging technology.

**Do you accept DVA patients?**
We do not offer DVA direct-billing for skin cancer consultations or procedures. DVA patients will need to pay out-of-pocket fees and seek reimbursement directly from DVA.

**Consultations**: Out-of-pocket gap applies with same-day Medicare rebate.

**Procedures**: All procedures will have fees explained by the treating doctor clearly. Medicare rebates vary depending on the type of treatment needed.

### Contact

- **Phone**: (02) 6109 0000
- **Hours**: Monday-Friday 8:00am-5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am-1:00pm, Sunday/Public Holidays Closed
- **Online booking**: Available 24/7 via HotDoc

#### Crace Clinic
- Address: Unit 1, 5 Baratta St, Crace ACT 2911
- Our flagship location with FotoFinder imaging
- Mon-Fri: 8:00am-5:30pm, Saturday: 8:30am-1:00pm

#### Denman Prospect Clinic
- Address: Level 1, 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611
- Modern facilities in the heart of Molonglo Valley
- Mon-Fri: 8:00am-5:30pm, Saturday: 8:30am-1:00pm

New patients welcome. Online bookings are processed during business hours. For urgent concerns, please call or visit your nearest emergency department.

---

## Services Page

### Our Services

Comprehensive skin cancer services provided by our team of specialist doctors.

#### Full Body Skin Checks
Comprehensive examination of your entire body to detect skin cancers early.
- Complete head-to-toe examination
- Dermoscopy for detailed mole analysis
- Digital photography for monitoring
- Immediate results and recommendations
- Duration: 30-45 minutes

#### Dermoscopy
Advanced magnification technology for precise skin lesion analysis.
- 10x magnification examination
- Pattern analysis of suspicious lesions
- Real-time assessment
- Enhanced diagnostic accuracy
- Duration: 15-30 minutes

#### Skin Cancer Excision
Expert surgical removal of skin cancers with minimal scarring.
- Local anaesthetic procedures
- Precise surgical techniques
- Tissue sent for pathology
- Post-operative care included
- Duration: 30-60 minutes

#### Skin Biopsies
Tissue sampling for definitive diagnosis of suspicious lesions.
- Punch biopsy technique
- Shave biopsy options
- Minimal discomfort
- Quick healing process
- Duration: 15-20 minutes

#### Skin Cancer Surveillance
Regular monitoring for patients with history of skin cancer.
- Scheduled follow-up appointments
- Progress monitoring
- Early detection protocols
- Personalised surveillance plans
- Duration: 20-30 minutes

#### Minor Procedures
Treatment of various benign skin conditions and cosmetic concerns.
- Mole removal
- Skin tag removal
- Cyst removal
- Cryotherapy treatments
- Duration: 15-45 minutes

---

## Doctors Page

### Our Skin Cancer Doctors

Meet our experienced team of skin cancer specialists across two Canberra locations.

#### Dr Chi So — Skin Cancer Specialist GP
- Credentials: BMed MPH MMed (Skin Cancer)
- Location: Denman Prospect
- Dr Chi So is a GP with extensive experience in skin cancer diagnosis and management. He believes in an empathetic and caring approach and can perform skin checks, dermoscopy, surveillance, excisions, biopsies, and minor procedures.

#### Dr Rachel Liang — Skin Cancer Specialist GP
- Credentials: Over a Decade in Skin Cancer
- Location: Denman Prospect
- Dr Rachel Liang is a highly experienced specialised skin cancer GP who is passionate about skin cancer diagnosis and surgery, having worked solely in this field for over a decade.

#### Dr Reiham Ibrahim — Skin Cancer Doctor (Accredited)
- Credentials: 25+ Years of GP Experience
- Location: Crace
- Dr Reiham Ibrahim is a highly experienced GP with a special passion for detecting and treating skin cancer early. She uses cutting-edge FotoFinder video dermoscopy technology.

#### Dr Kit Wong — Skin Cancer Specialist GP
- Credentials: Masters of Medicine (Skin Cancer)
- Location: Crace
- Dr Kit Wong graduated with honours from the University of Sydney and is a Fellow of the RACGP. He completed his Masters of Medicine (Skin Cancer) from the University of Queensland.

#### Dr Ian Chan — Skin Cancer Specialist GP
- Credentials: Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine
- Location: Crace
- Dr Ian Chan is very passionate about skin cancer medicine and has completed advanced training in the field with a Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine. He is committed to continuing medical education.

---

## Doctor Profile: Dr Chi So

### Dr Chi So — Skin Cancer Specialist GP

- **Credentials**: BMed MPH MMed (Skin Cancer)
- **Location**: Denman Clinic | Level 1, 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611
- **Phone**: 02 6109 0000
- **Fees**: Standard Consultation $180, Long Consultation $220, Medicare Rebate $43.90 / $84.90
- **Book**: https://yourgp.group/chiso

Dr Chi So is a GP with extensive experience in skin cancer diagnosis and management. He believes in an empathetic and caring approach to his consultations and can perform full body skin checks, mole and spot checks, dermoscopy, skin cancer surveillance, excisions, biopsies, and minor procedures.

Dr So completed the requirements for a Fellowship of the Royal College of General Practitioners in 2017. Due to his special interest in skin cancer, he went on to complete the Master of Medicine (Skin Cancer) and is an experienced dermoscopist (skin microscopy for diagnosis of skin cancer). His approach is to balance the need for effective skin cancer treatment with the cosmetic outcomes of such treatment.

Dr So has completed the Master of Public Health and has been involved in NHMRC-funded research projects in the field of skin cancer medicine. He has published research papers in international journals exploring the epidemiology and public health aspects of skin cancer management in Australian primary care.

**Qualifications:**
- BMed
- Master of Public Health (MPH)
- Master of Medicine (Skin Cancer)
- Fellow of the Royal College of General Practitioners (2017)

**Services:**
- Full body skin checks
- Mole and spot checks
- Dermoscopy
- Skin cancer surveillance
- Skin cancer excisions
- Biopsies and minor procedures

---

## Doctor Profile: Dr Rachel Liang

### Dr Rachel Liang — Skin Cancer Specialist GP

- **Location**: Denman Clinic | Level 1, 1B Felstead Vista, Denman Prospect ACT 2611
- **Phone**: 02 6109 0000
- **Fees**: Standard Consultation $180, Long Consultation $220, Medicare Rebate $43.90 / $84.90
- **Book**: https://yourgp.group/rachellian

Dr Rachel Liang is a highly experienced specialised skin cancer GP who loves her work and helping her patients. She is passionate about skin cancer diagnosis and surgery and has been working solely in this field for over a decade.

Dr Rachel Liang is a holistic and empathetic practitioner who is committed to achieving excellent outcomes for her patients. She has many years of surgical experience and has undertaken extensive surgical training from leading plastic surgeon Dr Alastair Taylor.

**Experience:**
- Over a decade specialising in skin cancer
- Extensive surgical training
- Trained by leading plastic surgeon Dr Alastair Taylor

**Specialties:**
- Holistic patient care approach
- Comprehensive skin examinations
- Advanced dermatological procedures
- Skin cancer diagnosis and surgery

---

## Doctor Profile: Dr Reiham Ibrahim

### Dr Reiham Ibrahim — Skin Cancer Doctor (Accredited)

- **Credentials**: 25+ Years of GP Experience | Advanced Skin Cancer Training
- **Location**: Crace Clinic | Unit 1, 5 Baratta St, Crace ACT 2911
- **Phone**: 02 6109 0000
- **Fees**: Standard Consultation $190, Long Consultation $230, Medicare Rebate $43.90 / $84.90
- **Book**: https://yourgp.group/reiham-ibr

**FotoFinder Digital Imaging Available**: Dr Ibrahim uses cutting-edge FotoFinder video dermoscopy technology that magnifies skin structures up to 400x for enhanced early detection. No additional charge applies.

Dr Reiham Ibrahim is a highly experienced GP with a special passion for detecting and treating skin cancer early — often before it becomes life-threatening. With over 25 years in medicine, she has dedicated much of her career to saving lives through early skin cancer diagnosis.

Dr Ibrahim holds advanced training in skin cancer detection, diagnosis, and surgical treatment. Using cutting-edge video dermoscopy technology that magnifies skin structures up to 400x, she can spot changes as small as a few millimetres — well before they're visible to the naked eye. Her precision and thorough approach give patients confidence and peace of mind.

Soon to be an Accredited Skin Cancer Doctor with the Skin Cancer College Australasia, Dr Ibrahim has removed thousands of lesions and provides expert care for both simple and complex skin cancers at our dedicated Skin Clinic. Whether you're booking a routine skin check or need expert care for a suspicious spot, you're in exceptionally capable hands with Dr Reiham Ibrahim.

**Qualifications:**
- Fellow of RACGP
- Diploma in Skin Cancer Medicine
- Advanced Certificate in Skin Cancer Surgery
- Advanced Certificate in Dermatoscopy

**FotoFinder Technology:**
- Digital dermoscopic imaging
- Track subtle lesion changes over time
- Enhanced early detection capabilities
- Comprehensive documentation

---

## Doctor Profile: Dr Kit Wong

### Dr Kit Wong — Skin Cancer Specialist GP

- **Credentials**: Masters of Medicine (Skin Cancer)
- **Location**: Crace Clinic | Unit 1, 5 Baratta St, Crace ACT 2911
- **Phone**: 02 6109 0000
- **Fees**: Standard Consultation $190, Long Consultation $230, Medicare Rebate $43.90 / $84.90
- **Book**: https://yourgp.group/kitwong

Dr Kit Wong graduated with honours from the University of Sydney in 2006 and is a Fellow of the RACGP. He completed his Masters of Medicine (Skin Cancer) from the University of Queensland in 2018, bringing advanced expertise to skin cancer diagnosis and treatment.

With over 10 years of experience in Skin Cancer Medicine, Dr Wong is actively involved in educating GP registrars through the college training program. He mentors and educates medical students and other GPs in the field, demonstrating his commitment to advancing skin cancer care.

**Qualifications:**
- University of Sydney (2006) — Honours
- Fellow of the RACGP
- Masters of Medicine (Skin Cancer) — UQ 2018

**Services:**
- Comprehensive skin checks
- Cryotherapy and biopsies
- Melanoma excision
- Skin cancer surgical procedures
- Mole skin tag and cyst removal

---

## Doctor Profile: Dr Ian Chan

### Dr Ian Chan — Skin Cancer Specialist GP

- **Credentials**: Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine
- **Location**: Crace Clinic | Unit 1, 5 Baratta St, Crace ACT 2911
- **Phone**: 02 6109 0000
- **Fees**: Standard Consultation $190, Long Consultation $230, Medicare Rebate $43.90 / $84.90
- **Book**: https://yourgp.group/ianchan

Dr Ian is very passionate about skin cancer medicine, and has completed advanced training in the field with a Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine. He is committed to continuing medical education through teaching medical students, and often has students assisting him during procedures.

Dr Chan grew up in Auckland. He moved to Canberra in 2011 to finish his studies in medicine at the ANU. He loves Canberra so he has remained ever since, dedicating his practice to specialized skin cancer care.

**Qualifications:**
- Masters in Skin Cancer Medicine
- Medicine studies at ANU
- Advanced skin cancer training

**Specialties:**
- Specialist focus on skin-related consultations
- Advanced skin cancer procedures
- Comprehensive skin examinations
- Educational approach to patient care

---

## Case Studies Page

### Case Studies

Real patient journeys — examples of skin cancer detection, diagnosis, and treatment at YourSkinCBR.

#### Basal Cell Carcinoma — Ear
Early detection of a basal cell carcinoma on the ear, identified during a routine full body skin check. Excised on-site with clear margins confirmed by pathology.
- **Treatment**: Surgical excision
- **Outcome**: Clear margins, full recovery

#### Suspicious Lesion — Dermoscopy Detection
A suspicious lesion identified through dermoscopic examination during a comprehensive skin check. Biopsy confirmed the diagnosis and treatment was completed on-site.
- **Treatment**: Biopsy and excision
- **Outcome**: Early detection, successful treatment

More case studies coming soon. We regularly add new cases to demonstrate our diagnostic and treatment capabilities.

## Footer (all pages)

YourSkinCBR — Professional skin cancer checks with qualified specialist GPs across two convenient Canberra locations. Advanced technology including FotoFinder digital imaging for comprehensive care.

Phone: (02) 6109 0000

### Locations
